properties.name: platform.rest.server.logging.rules[*].path
properties.description: Ant-style URI pattern this rule applies to (e.g. /api/**).

properties.name: platform.rest.server.logging.rules[*].methods
properties.description: HTTP methods this rule applies to (e.g. GET, POST). Omit or leave empty to match all methods.

properties.name: platform.rest.server.logging.rules[*].enabled
properties.description: Set to false to silence all logging (request and response) for matching requests. Defaults to true.

properties.name: platform.rest.server.logging.rules[*].request.enabled
properties.description: When true, the request body is captured and included in the log entry.

properties.name: platform.rest.server.logging.rules[*].response.enabled
properties.description: When true, the response body is captured and included in the log entry.
